sql: INSERT INTO user_history (user_id, action, details, created_at) SELECT u.id as user_id, #{action} as action, CASE WHEN #{detailType} = 'full' THEN CONCAT(u.name, ' - ', u.email, ' - ', u.department) WHEN #{detailType} = 'name' THEN u.name ELSE CONCAT('User ID: ', u.id) END as details, NOW() as created_at FROM users u WHERE u.status IN (#{statusList}) AND u.department_id IN (#{deptIds}) AND u.id NOT IN (#{excludeUserIds})
templateSql:
INSERT INTO user_history (user_id, action, details, created_at)
SELECT
    u.id as user_id,
    #{action} as action,
    CASE
        <when test="detailType == 'full'">CONCAT(u.name, ' - ', u.email, ' - ', u.department)</when>
        <when test="detailType == 'name'">u.name</when>
        <otherwise>CONCAT('User ID: ', u.id)</otherwise>
    END as details,
    NOW() as created_at
FROM users u
<where>
    <if test="statusList != null and statusList.size() > 0">
        AND u.status IN
        <foreach collection="statusList" item="s" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{s}
        </foreach>
    </if>
    <if test="deptIds != null and deptIds.size() > 0">
        AND u.department_id IN
        <foreach collection="deptIds" item="did" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{did}
        </foreach>
    </if>
    <if test="excludeUserIds != null and excludeUserIds.size() > 0">
        AND u.id NOT IN
        <foreach collection="excludeUserIds" item="eid" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{eid}
        </foreach>
    </if>
</where>
